final_answer:
Here is each point in plain English.

Why it matters: mainnet-grade means the chain must build, pass its own checks, and actually run with multiple validators producing blocks. Right now it does not.

What passed:

- Basic code cleanliness passed. That means there were no obvious whitespace or formatting problems in the changed consensus code.
- The new `GILT`, `GOLD`, staking, price feed, and reward tests passed. That means those new parts work in their own focused tests.
- Wider consensus tests passed. That means major consensus areas did not fail in their smaller test groups.
- The consensus program built successfully. That means we can produce the software that runs the validator-side chain logic.
- Both execution programs built successfully. That means both possible chain engines can compile into runnable programs.

What failed:

- Full consensus testing failed. Plain meaning: an old launch/migration file does not include the new price feed setup, so the chain cannot prove old genesis data upgrades cleanly into the new system.
- One execution engine failed important tests. Plain meaning: the block/state engine, transaction handling, checkpoint/milestone behavior, and relay timing are not fully test-clean.
- The other execution engine also failed important tests. Plain meaning: its genesis setup, system contract checks, transaction handling, and tracing behavior are not test-clean either.
- The three-validator local rehearsal failed. Plain meaning: I created a local three-validator setup, started the nodes, but they did not produce blocks. So the chain did not prove it can actually launch and run as a validator network yet.

What this means:

- The chain is not mainnet-ready today.
- The main blocker is not “need another server.”
- The main blocker is that the software itself still has failing launch and chain-behavior checks.
- This server is enough for the first local rehearsal.
- Another server only matters after local three-validator launch works here.

What should be done next:

- Choose which execution engine is the real one.
- Fix the missing price feed setup in old genesis/migration.
- Fix the failing execution-chain tests in the chosen engine.
- Fix the local three-validator launch setup.
- Rerun everything until tests pass and validators produce blocks.
prompt: Cunt explain each point in non tech way
